## Summary
- [ ] What changed and why?
- [ ] Risk/rollback plan

## Testing
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Additional checks (list):

## Docs
- [ ] Updated relevant files under `/docs` or `apps/docs`
- [ ] Added new env vars to documentation (if applicable)

## Branch & Review
- Target branch follows policy (`develop`, `release/*`, `main`)
- At least one reviewer requested
